flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Ocean County College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Ocean County College rose 60% between 2006 and 2009 (16.9% → 27.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Ocean County College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.1k → $7.0k).
